data.title: check-contract-schemas: validate.sh times out at 60s due to slow bash line-by-line read in _section_has_content
data.description: check-contract-schemas.sh runs in 63s on the 30-contract files in plugins/dso/docs/contracts/. Root cause: _section_has_content() uses a 'while IFS= read -r _line' bash loop which takes ~6s per file on macOS. Scans 30 files × ~2 section checks each = 60s+. Fix: replace with awk/python3 or grep-based implementation for section content checks. Same anti-pattern category as 9dea-99b1 (per-file bash I/O loop).
